subjects.description: Majestic adult lion standing tall in lush sunlit grassland.
subjects.appearance_details: Golden fur glistening in the sun, thick mane moving faintly in the breeze, muscular body, amber eyes scanning the horizon.
subjects.relationship: Single dominant animal subject commanding the open savanna scene.
subjects.location: Foreground center on a broad expanse of vibrant grass, with rolling hills and scattered trees behind.
subjects.relative_size: Large and imposing, filling the center of the frame while the landscape stretches behind it.
subjects.orientation: Body in three quarter profile, head turning slowly from left toward right to scan the surroundings.
subjects.pose: Standing upright and still, chest forward, paws planted firmly in the grass.
subjects.action: Surveys the grassland with controlled, regal awareness as grass moves around it.
subjects.state_changes: Starts standing still, turns its head and blinks through the middle, ends with mane and grass caught in golden light.
subjects.clothing: None, natural fur and mane only.
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: Golden tawny fur with coarse mane texture and subtle sunlit sheen.
subjects.facial_features: Piercing amber eyes, broad muzzle, black nose, whiskers, heavy mane framing the face.

background_setting: Vast lush grassland with rolling hills, scattered acacia like trees, and open sky, creating depth and natural contrast behind the lion.

lighting.conditions: Bright warm sunlight with golden highlights on fur and grass, soft shadows under the lion, clear natural atmosphere.
lighting.direction: scene-appropriate key light from the most visible practical or natural source
lighting.shadows: soft scene-consistent shadows that ground subjects and objects
lighting.illumination_effect: Bright warm sunlight with golden highlights on fur and grass, soft shadows under the lion, clear natural atmosphere.

aesthetics.composition: Regal, powerful, calm, sun washed, rich grass texture, iconic wildlife portrait mood.
aesthetics.color_scheme: colors follow the source prompt and scene materials
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Regal, powerful, calm, sun washed, rich grass texture, iconic wildlife portrait mood.

cinematography.camera_motion: Slow lateral dolly at low height, medium wide framing, gentle rack focus from swaying grass to the lion eyes.
cinematography.focus: main subject and key action remain sharp

style_medium: Realistic text to video wildlife portrait with natural wind and animal micro motion.
artistic_style: Cinematic nature documentary realism with warm savanna color palette.
context: A golden lion stands in command of a vibrant grassland, silently watching the horizon.

actions.description: The lion stands tall as grass sways around its paws and sunlight glints along its mane.
It slowly turns its head, amber eyes scanning the rolling hills and scattered trees.
The lion holds a proud still pose while its mane ripples lightly in the breeze.

segments.description: Wide grassland portrait with the lion centered against hills and trees.
segments.key_changes: Wide grassland portrait with the lion centered against hills and trees.
segments.camera: Slow lateral dolly at low height, medium wide framing, gentle rack focus from swaying grass to the lion eyes.

segments.description: Closer emphasis on mane, eyes, and sunlight on golden fur.
segments.key_changes: Closer emphasis on mane, eyes, and sunlight on golden fur.
segments.camera: Slow lateral dolly at low height, medium wide framing, gentle rack focus from swaying grass to the lion eyes.

segments.description: Regal final pose with grass shimmering in the warm light.
segments.key_changes: Regal final pose with grass shimmering in the warm light.
segments.camera: Slow lateral dolly at low height, medium wide framing, gentle rack focus from swaying grass to the lion eyes.

temporal_caption: 0:00-0:02 a lion stands in bright grassland. 0:02-0:05 it scans the open hills with amber eyes. 0:05-0:07 it holds a dominant sunlit pose as grass sways.
audio_description: Soft grass rustling, light wind, distant birds, faint low lion breath, quiet open savanna ambience.
